title: Front Office Manager - Swiggy Restaurant Partners Advisory Limited - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Swiggy Restaurant Partners Advisory Limited - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Swiggy Restaurant Partners Advisory Limited is actively seeking a talented and motivated Front Office Manager to join our dynamic team in Ahmedabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Swiggy Restaurant Partners Advisory Limited:
Swiggy Restaurant Partners Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in GDS Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Swiggy Restaurant Partners Advisory Limited!
